die-cut-sticker.name: Die Cut Stickers
die-cut-sticker.blurb: Features thick, premium-grade material designed for durability and vibrant printing.
die-cut-sticker.featureDescription: Upload your artwork and Musticker will cut it exactly to the outline you intended. Even intricate shapes come out clean and crisp with our state-of-the-art cutting technology.

custom-lettering.name: Vinyl Lettering
custom-lettering.blurb: The displayed surface color is for demonstration purposes only. Letters are cut individually, self-adhesive, pre-spaced, and come with application tape applied.
